command:
echo "=== Find exact groupPolicy schema + allowlist mechanism for telegram ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
grep -rn "groupPolicy" /home/jose/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/docs/ 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo ""
echo "--- policy.md group section ---"
sed -n '160,200p' /home/jose/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/docs/cli/policy.md 2>/dev/null
echo ""
echo "--- how to allow a specific group: search for groupAllowFrom WITH telegram + groups ---"
grep -rn -A3 "groupAllowFrom\|groupPolicy.*allowlist\|telegram.*groups" /home/jose/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/docs/gateway/ 2>/dev/null | head -25
REMOTE
